name: Parallax Hero
description: Multi-layer parallax scroll effect — each layer moves at a different speed creating depth.
accessibility_notes: parallax is decorative — all content should be readable without scroll effect

layers.description: Array of layer objects with content and scroll speed multiplier

height.description: Total scrollable height of the parallax container

className.description: CSS class for the outer container

conflicts: tall height values increase scroll distance — may feel sluggish on trackpad
usage_tip: Best for storytelling landing pages; avoid excessive scroll height values.
